name: track_event
description: Record a user action or event with properties, sending it to all connected destinations for analytics and activation.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the user (required if anonymousId not provided)

parameters.name: anonymousId
parameters.description: Anonymous identifier (required if userId not provided)

parameters.name: event
parameters.description: Name of the event being tracked

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event occurred
